ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Genymobile/scrcpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy
Language: c
Display and control your Android device

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: arendst/Tasmota
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/arendst/Tasmota
Language: c
Alternative firmware for ESP8266 and ESP32 based devices with easy configuration using webUI, OTA updates, automation using timers or rules, expandability and entirely local control over MQTT, HTTP, Serial or KNX. Full documentation at

ns0:entry.ns0:title: darktable-org/darktable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/darktable-org/darktable
Language: c
darktable is an open source photography workflow application and raw developer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
Language: c
A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashcat/hashcat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashcat/hashcat
Language: c
World's fastest and most advanced password recovery utility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwrt/openwrt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt
Language: c
This repository is a mirror of https://git.openwrt.org/openwrt/openwrt.git It is for reference only and is not active for check-ins. We will continue to accept Pull Requests here. They will be merged via staging trees then into openwrt.git.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: systemd/systemd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/systemd/systemd
Language: c
The systemd System and Service Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass
Language: c
Free, open-source iCloud activation lock bypass tool. Remove iCloud lock from iPhone 5s through iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 12-26.1). Fully offline -- no servers, no payments. Supports checkm8 (A5-A11) and session activation (A12+).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: veracrypt/VeraCrypt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/veracrypt/VeraCrypt
Language: c
Disk encryption with strong security based on TrueCrypt

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ https://windows-internals.com
